name: procurement officers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement officers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month, inconsistent delivery times cause supplier penalties. We provide a vendor performance tracker instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement officers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Inconsistent delivery times and quality from vendors
